Appearances:
Plaintiff Lora Stucky is present.
Michael Hall, Attorney for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brian Bromberger is present.
Attorney Eileen Evans appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JUL-01-2013 remains on calendar.
